products.title: Nike Air Max 270
products.description: The Nike Air Max 270 delivers visible cushioning under every step. Inspired by two icons of big Air, the 270 features Nike's biggest heel Air unit yet for a super-soft ride that feels as impossible as it looks.

products.title: Nike Revolution 6
products.description: Comfortable, supportive and durable. The Nike Revolution 6 delivers the comfort and reliability you need for any run. Great for beginners and experienced runners alike.

products.title: Adidas Ultraboost 22
products.description: Energy-returning shoes made in part with recycled materials. Feel the boost. These running shoes have a BOOST midsole for incredible energy return with every stride.

products.title: Adidas Stan Smith
products.description: Iconic tennis-inspired shoes with a timeless silhouette. Originally designed for tennis courts, the classic Stan Smith has become a streetwear icon.

products.title: iPhone 15 Pro
products.description: The iPhone 15 Pro features a titanium design, A17 Pro chip, advanced camera system with 48MP Main camera, and Action button. Available in multiple colors.

products.title: iPhone 14
products.description: All-day battery life. Vital safety features. And even more Pro camera capabilities. Meet iPhone 14, now with emergency SOS via satellite and Crash Detection.

products.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
products.description: Epic just got more epic. Meet Galaxy S24 Ultra with Galaxy AI, 200MP camera, built-in S Pen, and titanium design. The ultimate smartphone experience.

products.title: Samsung Galaxy A54
products.description: Awesome in every way. Galaxy A54 5G features a stunning 120Hz display, 50MP camera with OIS, and long-lasting battery. Premium features at an accessible price.

products.title: Sony WH-1000XM5
products.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer, crystal clear hands-free calling, and Multipoint connection. Up to 30 hours battery life.

products.title: Sony WF-1000XM4
products.description: True wireless earbuds with industry-leading noise cancellation, exceptional sound quality, and long battery life. Perfect for music lovers on the go.

products.title: Nike Dri-FIT Training Shirt
products.description: Stay dry and comfortable during intense workouts. Nike Dri-FIT technology wicks sweat away from your skin for quick evaporation.

products.title: Nike Tech Fleece Hoodie
products.description: Engineered for warmth without the weight. Nike Tech Fleece offers premium warmth with a streamlined fit that won't weigh you down.

products.title: Adidas Essentials 3-Stripes Hoodie
products.description: Classic comfort with iconic style. This hoodie features the legendary 3-Stripes on the sleeves and a kangaroo pocket for small item storage.

products.title: Adidas Tiro Track Pants
products.description: Soccer-inspired pants made for everyday life. Featuring tapered legs with ankle zips and signature 3-Stripes down the sides.

products.title: Nike Heritage Backpack
products.description: Classic design meets modern functionality. Spacious main compartment with multiple pockets for organization. Perfect for school or everyday use.

products.title: Adidas Classic Badge of Sport Backpack
products.description: Carry your essentials in style with this sporty backpack. Features padded shoulder straps and multiple compartments for organization.

products.title: Apple Watch Series 9
products.description: Our most powerful smartwatch yet. Features a brighter display, faster chip, and precision finding for iPhone. Health and fitness tracking at your fingertips.

products.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
products.description: Advanced health monitoring with personalized sleep coaching. Track your fitness, monitor heart health, and stay connected all day long.

products.title: Nike Sports Sunglasses
products.description: Performance sunglasses with 100% UV protection. Lightweight frame with secure fit designed for active lifestyles and outdoor sports.

products.title: Sony PlayStation 5 Controller
products.description: Experience haptic feedback and adaptive triggers. Discover a deeper, highly immersive gaming experience with the DualSense wireless controller.
